title: 日本ダービーの後に・超

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning the Japanese Derby, Narita Brian is
focused on winning more than ever before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Expectations from fans rise again as talk
circulates that she might be able to win five G1
races if she keeps up the pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Hishi Amazon has just won the second
tiara on the Tiara tour. The two of them decide to
settle their rivalry at the Arima Kinen once both
Classic Triple Crown series are finished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The challenge spikes Narita Brian's fighting spirit.
Before that match, however, we have the Kikuka
Sho—the final race of the Classic Triple Crown!
